The {{RewardIconWithLink|Robot Ticket|orange}} is a reward for many events that gives you a random generic [[Robot]].

The chances of what [[Robot]] you will get are as follows:
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}} (50.00%)
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}} (35.00%)
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T3|purple}} (10.00%)
* {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T4|orange}} (5.00%)

After redeeming 10 {{RewardIconWithLink|Robot Ticket|orange}} you are guaranteed to receive a {{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T4|orange}}.

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
